description:
⚡Build Your AI Agency & Land Your First Client ⚡
https://www.skool.com/chase-ai

🔥 FREE Skool community with 100+ Templates! 🔥 
https://www.skool.com/chase-ai-community

💻 Need custom work? Book a consult 💻
https://chaseai.io

Your LLM is getting worse with every message you send - and multiple research studies have confirmed it. In this video, I break down context rot: the silent performance killer affecting every large language model from Claude to GPT to Gemini. I explain what context windows actually are, how tokens work, and why performance degrades as your context fills up. 

More importantly, I show you what to do about it - from how you structure the tasks you give your LLM to session management strategies that keep performance high. I also cover how frameworks like the Ralph loop and GSD are built specifically around this problem, using fresh context windows to maintain peak AI performance throughout complex projects.

⏰TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 - The Secret Killer
1:46 - Context Windows & Tokens
7:44 - Fighting Context Rot
12:34 - Final Thoughts

RESOURCES FROM THIS VIDEO:
➡️ Learn More About AI Agents: https://www.skool.com/chase-ai
➡️ My Website: https://www.chaseai.io
➡️ Chroma Study: https://research.trychroma.com/context-rot

#ai #claudecode #coding
fulltitle: The Secret Poison Killing Your Claude Code Performance
